extract: If you were looking for the Scizor belonging to Shingo whose nickname is Blade, see Shingo. Kartana (Japanese: カミツルギ Kamiturugi) is a dual-type Grass/Steel Pokémon introduced in Generation VII. It is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon. It is one of the Ultra Beasts and is codenamed UB-04 Blade (Japanese: ＵＢ０４ Ｓｌａｓｈ) by the International Police.
